title: Oriental Fantasy Scroll Emergence Poster AI
sourceTitle: Oriental Fantasy Scroll Emergence Poster AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: 9:16 oriental fantasy narrative portrait poster for moonlit immortal woman emerging from a vertical painted scroll, from the series 画中美人 · 破卷而出. Subject: moonlit immortal woman emerging from a vertical painted scroll visibly emerges from a central vertical hanging scroll through half stepping out of the scroll while one hand reaches toward the viewer, preserving a clear fantasy portrait identity and making the figure feel halfway between painted world and real space. Scene: The scroll interior contains moonlit pavilion, ink mist, pale magnolia branches, distant water reflection, while the outer real space stays luminous, misty, and theatrical with Eastern fantasy atmosphere and refined poster depth. Composition: Fixed mobile vertical 9:16 poster: a very obvious long vertical scroll or hanging axis is the core structure; the character breaks through the scroll boundary rather than merely standing in front of it; foreground layers use soft flower branches, drifting petals, thin mist, and subtle golden dust to cross the frame and reinforce the emergence effect. Signature Elements: moonlit immortal woman emerging from a vertical painted scroll, half stepping out of the scroll while one hand reaches toward the viewer, moonlit pavilion, ink mist, pale magnolia branches, distant water reflection, soft flower branches, drifting petals, thin mist, and subtle golden dust, clear vertical scroll, broken picture boundary, drifting petals or particles, Eastern fantasy costume, and 画中美人 · 破卷而出 narrative feeling. Style: High-finish oriental fantasy narrative portrait, xianxia romance poster polish, cinematic fantasy lighting, delicate costume and makeup detail, elegant scroll painting integration, and premium mobile wallpaper quality. Color Palette: Soft jade, ivory, moon white, pale gold, ink mist, and theme-matched accent colors from the character and scroll world, kept harmonious and luminous. Lighting: Dreamlike soft key light on the face and hands, glowing scroll boundary, mist diffusion, subtle gold particles, and layered depth between painted world and real foreground. Camera: Vertical cinematic portrait framing with the face and reaching gesture readable, scroll structure fully visible, and foreground elements creating depth without covering the identity. Materials: Painted silk scroll, rice-paper fibers, flowing hanfu fabric, hair ornaments, flowers or feathers, mist, gold dust, torn scroll edges, and ink-wash background texture. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。

imagePrompts.title: Oriental Fantasy Scroll Emergence Poster Moonlit Immortal Woman Emerging From A Vertical

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: 9:16 oriental fantasy narrative portrait poster for gentle flower spirit walking out of a garden scroll, from the series 画中美人 · 破卷而出. Subject: gentle flower spirit walking out of a garden scroll visibly emerges from a central vertical hanging scroll through one foot outside the scroll, sleeves and floral vines crossing the frame boundary, preserving a clear fantasy portrait identity and making the figure feel halfway between painted world and real space. Scene: The scroll interior contains peach blossom garden, water pavilion, low morning haze, while the outer real space stays luminous, misty, and theatrical with Eastern fantasy atmosphere and refined poster depth. Composition: Fixed mobile vertical 9:16 poster: a very obvious long vertical scroll or hanging axis is the core structure; the character breaks through the scroll boundary rather than merely standing in front of it; foreground layers use peach blossoms, silk ribbons, small birds, and light floral mist to cross the frame and reinforce the emergence effect. Signature Elements: gentle flower spirit walking out of a garden scroll, one foot outside the scroll, sleeves and floral vines crossing the frame boundary, peach blossom garden, water pavilion, low morning haze, peach blossoms, silk ribbons, small birds, and light floral mist, clear vertical scroll, broken picture boundary, drifting petals or particles, Eastern fantasy costume, and 画中美人 · 破卷而出 narrative feeling. Style: High-finish oriental fantasy narrative portrait, xianxia romance poster polish, cinematic fantasy lighting, delicate costume and makeup detail, elegant scroll painting integration, and premium mobile wallpaper quality. Color Palette: Soft jade, ivory, moon white, pale gold, ink mist, and theme-matched accent colors from the character and scroll world, kept harmonious and luminous. Lighting: Dreamlike soft key light on the face and hands, glowing scroll boundary, mist diffusion, subtle gold particles, and layered depth between painted world and real foreground. Camera: Vertical cinematic portrait framing with the face and reaching gesture readable, scroll structure fully visible, and foreground elements creating depth without covering the identity. Materials: Painted silk scroll, rice-paper fibers, flowing hanfu fabric, hair ornaments, flowers or feathers, mist, gold dust, torn scroll edges, and ink-wash background texture. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

以下の英語画像生成プロンプトを使用してください。表示テキスト、ブランド名、変数値、パラメータは英語のまま保持します。

Theme: 9:16 oriental fantasy narrative portrait poster for moonlit immortal woman emerging from a vertical painted scroll, from the series 画中美人 · 破卷而出. Subject: moonlit immortal woman emerging from a vertical painted scroll visibly emerges from a central vertical hanging scroll through half stepping out of the scroll while one hand reaches toward the viewer, preserving a clear fantasy portrait identity and making the figure feel halfway between painted world and real space. Scene: The scroll interior contains moonlit pavilion, ink mist, pale magnolia branches, distant water reflection, while the outer real space stays luminous, misty, and theatrical with Eastern fantasy atmosphere and refined poster depth. Composition: Fixed mobile vertical 9:16 poster: a very obvious long vertical scroll or hanging axis is the core structure; the character breaks through the scroll boundary rather than merely standing in front of it; foreground layers use soft flower branches, drifting petals, thin mist, and subtle golden dust to cross the frame and reinforce the emergence effect. Signature Elements: moonlit immortal woman emerging from a vertical painted scroll, half stepping out of the scroll while one hand reaches toward the viewer, moonlit pavilion, ink mist, pale magnolia branches, distant water reflection, soft flower branches, drifting petals, thin mist, and subtle golden dust, clear vertical scroll, broken picture boundary, drifting petals or particles, Eastern fantasy costume, and 画中美人 · 破卷而出 narrative feeling. Style: High-finish oriental fantasy narrative portrait, xianxia romance poster polish, cinematic fantasy lighting, delicate costume and makeup detail, elegant scroll painting integration, and premium mobile wallpaper quality. Color Palette: Soft jade, ivory, moon white, pale gold, ink mist, and theme-matched accent colors from the character and scroll world, kept harmonious and luminous. Lighting: Dreamlike soft key light on the face and hands, glowing scroll boundary, mist diffusion, subtle gold particles, and layered depth between painted world and real foreground. Camera: Vertical cinematic portrait framing with the face and reaching gesture readable, scroll structure fully visible, and foreground elements creating depth without covering the identity. Materials: Painted silk scroll, rice-paper fibers, flowing hanfu fabric, hair ornaments, flowers or feathers, mist, gold dust, torn scroll edges, and ink-wash background texture. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.
promptTranslations.ko:
아래 영어 이미지 생성 프롬프트를 사용하세요. 보이는 텍스트, 브랜드명, 변수 값, 매개변수는 영어로 유지하세요.
